name: crypto-news-copilot
description: Real-time crypto news, prices, sentiment analysis, AI research reports & market data in GitHub Copilot Chat

chatParticipants.name: crypto
chatParticipants.description: Real-time crypto news, prices, sentiment, AI research & market data from cryptocurrency.cv

commands.name: breaking
commands.description: Latest breaking crypto news with priority & sentiment

commands.name: news
commands.description: Get the latest crypto news headlines

commands.name: price
commands.description: Get current price for a coin (e.g. /price bitcoin)

commands.name: market
commands.description: Market overview with prices, Fear & Greed Index & sentiment

commands.name: sentiment
commands.description: AI sentiment analysis for a coin (e.g. /sentiment BTC)

commands.name: fear-greed
commands.description: Fear & Greed Index with trend & breakdown

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Why is a topic trending? AI explainer (e.g. /explain DeFi)

commands.name: research
commands.description: Deep AI research report on a topic (e.g. /research Solana)

crypto.apiUrl.description: Base URL of the cryptocurrency.cv API

crypto.defaultLimit.description: Default number of items to fetch per request
